errors.title: Error
errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists.
errors.VALIDATION_FAILED: Please check your information and try again.
errors.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.HABITS_LIMIT_REACHED: You've reached the maximum number of active habits.
errors.HABIT_INACTIVE: This habit is no longer active.
errors.AI_RATE_LIMIT: AI service is busy. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.AI_TIMEOUT: AI request timed out. Please try again.
errors.AI_UNAVAILABLE: AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
errors.AI_NOT_CONFIGURED: AI service is not available at the moment.
errors.REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Your session is invalid. Please log in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your connection.

cookieBanner.title: Before you continue
cookieBanner.intro: To use Inside My Mind, you need to accept our privacy policy. This is necessary to save your habits, journals, and process AI analyses.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy & Terms
privacyPolicy.dataCollectionText: We collect information you provide directly: name, email, preferred language, and timezone. We also collect data about your habits, journals, and interactions with our AI agents to personalize your experience.
privacyPolicy.aiUsageText: We use AI (Google Gemini) to generate personalized habit plans and provide feedback on your journals. Your texts may be temporarily processed by these services for linguistic and behavioral analysis.
privacyPolicy.dataStorageText: Your data is stored on secure servers (Supabase/PostgreSQL). We do not sell, share, or transfer your personal data to third parties.
privacyPolicy.userRightsText: You have the right to: access your data, correct inaccurate data, request anonymization or deletion of your data, and revoke consent. To exercise your rights, use the account deletion feature in settings.
privacyPolicy.cookiesText: We use essential cookies for authentication and basic functionality. We do not use tracking or third-party advertising cookies.
privacyPolicy.contactText: For privacy questions, contact us at: privacy@insidemymind.app
privacyPolicy.updatesText: This policy may be updated periodically. We will notify you of significant changes.

seo.title: Inside My Mind — AI-Powered Habit Tracker | 66-Day Journey
seo.description: Open source habit tracker with 3 specialized AI agents. 66-day journey, daily journaling, linguistic and behavioral feedback. 100% free, no credit card required.

hero.subtitle: Stop abandoning habits by week 2. Three free AI agents guide you through a science-backed 66-day journey — from intention to automaticity.

phases.title: The 66-Day Rule
phases.subtitle: Research shows it takes 66 days to form an automatic habit. We break this into 3 phases — each with AI-powered guidance.

phase1.title: Foundation
phase1.desc: Establish your routine. Create the trigger that makes it stick.

phase2.title: Active Production
phase2.desc: Intentional growth. Every session harder than the last.

phase3.title: Consolidation
phase3.desc: The habit runs itself. You become someone who just does this.

ultralearning.title: Your Journal. Real AI Feedback.
ultralearning.subtitle: Journaling as immersive practice. The AI adapts per habit type — linguistic skills get a Language Teacher, behavioral habits get a Behavioral Coach.

steps.1: Create a habit and choose your target skill (language or behavioral).
steps.2: The AI generates a 66-day plan with phases, tasks, and techniques.
steps.3: Journal daily. The right AI agent analyzes your entry and gives feedback.

agents.title: AI That Analyzes, Corrects, and Challenges You — Zero Cost

habitPlanner.title: Habit Planner
habitPlanner.desc: Get a personalized 66-day plan with daily tasks, phases, and proven techniques — built in seconds.

languageTeacher.title: Language Teacher
languageTeacher.desc: Practicing English? Get grammar scores, vocabulary analysis, corrections, and daily challenges.

behavioralCoach.title: Behavioral Coach
behavioralCoach.desc: Tracks your mood, energy, consistency patterns, and gives micro-actions for tomorrow.

features.title: Everything You Need to Not Quit

cycles.title: 66-Day Cycles
cycles.desc: Every day counts. See all 66 days ahead of you.

analytics.title: Streak Analytics
analytics.desc: Watch your consistency grow. Don't break the chain.

journaling.title: Daily Journaling
journaling.desc: Write daily. Get smarter feedback than any journal app.

multilanguage.title: Multi-language
multilanguage.desc: Practice in your target language. Track it here.

freeAI.title: 100% Free AI
freeAI.desc: Zero cost forever. No credit card, no trial.

opensource.title: 100% Free & Open Source
opensource.subtitle: Inside My Mind is built in public as a learning project for SaaS architecture. No paid tiers, no monetization. Contribute, fork, or learn from the code.
opensource.buildInPublic: Build in Public: mistakes and learnings documented with transparency.

cta.title: Stop planning. Start today.
cta.subtitle: 66 days. 3 AI agents. Zero excuses. 100% free.

footer.copy: © 2026 Inside My Mind. Built with 🧠 and discipline.

login.title: Log In
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Let's keep the streak alive.
login.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
login.emailNotVerifiedDesc: Check your inbox and click the confirmation link.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Start your 66-day transformation today.
register.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.toastSuccessDesc: We sent a confirmation email. Check your inbox.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDesc: If an account with that email exists, we've sent a password reset link.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Create a new password for your account.
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
resetPassword.toastSuccessDesc: You can now log in with your new password.
resetPassword.tokenInvalid: This link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new one.

verifyEmail.verifyingDesc: Please wait while we confirm your email.
verifyEmail.errorDesc: This link has expired or is invalid. Please create a new account.

journal.skillBuildingBanner: Write in {skill} to receive linguistic feedback from your AI Language Teacher.
journal.placeholderSkill: Write about your session in the target language...
journal.placeholderTracking: How did your habit go today? How are you feeling?
journal.micNotSupported: Recording not supported in this browser

ai.placeholder: Save your entry to receive AI analysis.

habits.tooltipLimit: You've reached the limit of {max} active habits. Complete a 66-day cycle or deactivate a habit to create another.
habits.warningBanner: ⚠️ You have {count} active habits. Research shows focusing on fewer habits increases success. Consider completing a 66-day cycle before adding more.
habits.warningBannerLimit: ⚠️ You have {count} active habits. Research shows focusing on fewer habits increases success. Complete a 66-day cycle or deactivate a habit to create another.
habits.emptySubtitle: Create your first habit to start your 66-day journey.

en-US.name: English
en-US.short: Develop oral fluency and listening comprehension
en-US.long: Get a 66-day plan with structured daily tasks. The AI analyzes your writing and provides feedback on grammar, vocabulary, and pronunciation.

es-ES.name: Spanish
es-ES.long: Structured 3-phase plan with daily exercises. Real-time AI feedback on your linguistic progress.

fr-FR.name: French
fr-FR.short: Develop oral and written fluency in French
fr-FR.long: Structured 66-day plan with progressive daily tasks. AI feedback on grammar, vocabulary, and idiomatic expressions.

pt-BR.name: Portuguese
pt-BR.long: For those learning Portuguese. 66 days with progressive tasks and contextualized feedback.

general.name: General
general.short: Reading, studying, productivity and varied habits
general.long: Use for any habit that isn't physical or emotional wellness: reading, playing an instrument, personal organization. The AI tracks your consistency, triggers, and patterns — and suggests a micro-action for tomorrow.

fitness.name: Fitness
fitness.short: Gym, running, weightlifting and physical exercise
fitness.long: Use for any physical practice. The AI tracks your energy, recovery, and training consistency — and suggests adjustments for your next session.

mindfulness.name: Mindfulness
mindfulness.long: Use for mindfulness practices: meditation, breathing exercises, gratitude journaling, or body scan. The AI focuses on your emotional state, stress level, and quality of presence.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Settings are being built. Soon you will be able to customize your experience here.
settings.languageBanner: Change the language of the application interface.
settings.avatarErrorSize: File too large. Please upload an image up to 5MB.
settings.avatarErrorType: Invalid file type. Please upload a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
settings.avatarErrorUpload: Failed to upload avatar. Please try again.
settings.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
settings.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a little about yourself...
settings.toastSuccessDesc: Your changes have been saved successfully.
settings.toastErrorDesc: Could not save changes. Please try again.
settings.accountDescription: Deleting your account permanently removes all your data.
settings.privacyCardDescription: Read our privacy policy to learn how we protect your data.

deleteModal.title: Delete account
deleteModal.warning: This action is permanent and irreversible. All your data will be deleted.
deleteModal.error: Could not delete account. Please try again.

settings.tourCardDesc: Revisit the introduction tour at any time.
settings.tourRestartError: Could not restart the tour. Please try again.

step1.langSkillsHint: Get a 66-day plan with daily tasks. AI will analyze your writing and provide linguistic feedback.
step1.behaviorHint: Track consistency with an optional plan. AI monitors patterns and offers weekly tips.
step1.modeHintSkill: 📝 You'll receive a complete 66-day plan with structured daily tasks. AI will analyze your writing and provide linguistic feedback.
step1.modeHintTracking: 🎯 The AI will track your mood, energy, and behavioral patterns.

step2Skill.planNote: 📝 AI will generate a full 66-day plan (Mandatory)
step2Skill.strugglesPh: e.g., I freeze when speaking English. My vocabulary is limited for professional topics.

step2Tracking.optionalNote: 🎯 AI plan is optional for behavioral habits.
step2Tracking.barrierPh: e.g., I skip the gym on tired days.
step2Tracking.strugglesPh: e.g., I have trouble staying consistent.
step2Tracking.manualNote: Got it! You'll track this habit manually.

errors.barrierRequired: Describe your biggest barrier to continue

step3.loadingSubtitle: This usually takes a few seconds.
step3.regenerateError: Failed to regenerate plan. Please try again.
step3.feedbackLabel: What didn't you like about the plan? (optional)
step3.feedbackPlaceholder: E.g. the daily tasks were too long for my level
step3.errorSubtitle: Check your connection and try again.
step3.rateLimitSubtitle: Too many requests at once. Wait a few seconds and try again.

onboarding.step0Desc: This is your space to track habits, write in your journal, and visualize your progress. Let us take a quick tour?
onboarding.step1Desc: Here you manage all your habits. Create, edit, and track the progress of each one.
onboarding.step2Desc: Check off completed habits for the day. Consistency is the key to turning actions into habits.
onboarding.step3Desc: Write about your day, reflections, and feelings. The journal helps process experiences and stay focused.
onboarding.step4Desc: Visualize your progress over time with charts and statistics from your habits.
onboarding.step5Desc: You have seen the main features. Now it is time to put them into practice and build your routine.
